RewardMeaningText: mana_shard from Dungeon Beta's Guarded Path helps reopen City B's processors without leaning as hard on recovery strain.
CityImpactMeaningText: Reopens refined_mana processing while keeping the next dispatch window steadier than the Greedy Path.
RecommendationShiftText: Processing can restart, and City B can stabilize the next dispatch before taking another high-strain push.
